_comments._doc_id: Use 'INC_CRC' as the document ID to allow idempotent upserts from the batch sync job.
_comments.inc_crc: Unique hash from data.gov.sg — used as document ID for deduplication on upsert.
_comments.location: GeoJSON Point — coordinates are [longitude, latitude]. Elevation is dropped.
_comments.address.type: Building type code from source data. 'H' = HDB, 'C' = Commercial, etc.
_comments.region_id: Derived from postal code (central, north, north-east, east, west).
_comments.district_id: Derived from postal code. Currently same as region_id; can be enhanced later.
_comments.gov_last_updated: Parsed from the FMEL_UPD_D field in the source data (format: '20170602165922').
_comments.last_synced_at: Timestamp of when the batch sync job last processed this record.
_comments.is_active: Set to false if the bin no longer appears in the latest data.gov.sg feed.

description: To deposit recyclables such as paper, cardboard, glass bottles, plastic bottles and metal cans.
